text:
Scheduled PPS assessment. 01=Admission assessment (required by day 14)
02=Quarterly review assessment
03=Annual assessment
04=Significant change in status assessment
05=Significant correction to prior comprehensive assessment
06=Significant correction to prior quarterly assessment
99=None of the above 
^=Blank (skip pattern)
560 V0100B_PRIOR_PPS_CD V0100B_PRIOR_PPS_CD V0100B Prior Assessment PPS Reason for Assessment Code CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the PPS Reason for
